title: lamyra stellata
intro: Lamyra stellata, also known as Starry Lamyra or Lamyra stellata, is a flowering plant species native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lamyra stellata include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and promoting digestive health. Lamyra stellata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in dried form in traditional Chinese medicine.
